\chapter{A chapter stored as a Coq file}
\label{\detokenize{coqchapter:a-chapter-stored-as-a-coq-file}}\label{\detokenize{coqchapter::doc}}
\begin{alectryon}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Compute}~\PYG{o}{((}\PYG{k}{fun}~\PYG{o}{(}\PYG{+nv}{n}\PYG{o}{:}~nat\PYG{o}{)}~\PYG{o}{(}\PYG{+nv}{opt}\PYG{o}{:}~option~nat\PYG{o}{)}~\PYG{o}{(}\PYG{+nv}{eq}\PYG{o}{:}~opt~\PYG{o}{=}~Some~n\PYG{o}{)}~\PYG{o}{=\PYGZgt{}}~n\PYG{o}{)}\Al{nl}
      ~~~~~~~~~~~\PYGZus{}~\PYG{o}{(}Some~\PYG{l+m+mi}{3}\PYG{o}{)}~eq\PYGZus{}refl\PYG{o}{).}
    \end{\al{input}}
    \Al{sep}
    \begin{\al{output}}
      \begin{\al{messages}}
        \begin{\al{message}}
          \PYG{o}{=}~\PYG{l+m+mi}{3}\Al{nl}
          \PYG{o}{:}~nat
        \end{\al{message}}
      \end{\al{messages}}
    \end{\al{output}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
\end{alectryon}

\sphinxstepscope


\chapter{Explicit rst}
\label{\detokenize{literate1:explicit-rst}}\label{\detokenize{literate1::doc}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Files ending in \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{\_rst.v}} are processed as reStructuredText regardless of the \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{DEFAULT\_MARKUP}} setting:

\begin{alectryon}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Compute}~\PYG{o}{((}\PYG{k}{fun}~\PYG{o}{(}\PYG{+nv}{n}\PYG{o}{:}~nat\PYG{o}{)}~\PYG{o}{(}\PYG{+nv}{opt}\PYG{o}{:}~option~nat\PYG{o}{)}~\PYG{o}{(}\PYG{+nv}{eq}\PYG{o}{:}~opt~\PYG{o}{=}~Some~n\PYG{o}{)}~\PYG{o}{=\PYGZgt{}}~n\PYG{o}{)}\Al{nl}
      ~~~~~~~~~~~\PYGZus{}~\PYG{o}{(}Some~\PYG{l+m+mi}{3}\PYG{o}{)}~eq\PYGZus{}refl\PYG{o}{).}
    \end{\al{input}}
    \Al{sep}
    \begin{\al{output}}
      \begin{\al{messages}}
        \begin{\al{message}}
          \PYG{o}{=}~\PYG{l+m+mi}{3}\Al{nl}
          \PYG{o}{:}~nat
        \end{\al{message}}
      \end{\al{messages}}
    \end{\al{output}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
\end{alectryon}

\sphinxstepscope


\chapter{Explicit Markdown}
\label{\detokenize{literate2:explicit-markdown}}\label{\detokenize{literate2::doc}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Files ending in \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{\_md.v}} are processed as Markdown regardless of the \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{DEFAULT\_MARKUP}} setting:

\begin{alectryon}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Compute}~\PYG{o}{((}\PYG{k}{fun}~\PYG{o}{(}\PYG{+nv}{n}\PYG{o}{:}~nat\PYG{o}{)}~\PYG{o}{(}\PYG{+nv}{opt}\PYG{o}{:}~option~nat\PYG{o}{)}~\PYG{o}{(}\PYG{+nv}{eq}\PYG{o}{:}~opt~\PYG{o}{=}~Some~n\PYG{o}{)}~\PYG{o}{=\PYGZgt{}}~n\PYG{o}{)}\Al{nl}
      ~~~~~~~~~~~\PYGZus{}~\PYG{o}{(}Some~\PYG{l+m+mi}{3}\PYG{o}{)}~eq\PYGZus{}refl\PYG{o}{).}
    \end{\al{input}}
    \Al{sep}
    \begin{\al{output}}
      \begin{\al{messages}}
        \begin{\al{message}}
          \PYG{o}{=}~\PYG{l+m+mi}{3}\Al{nl}
          \PYG{o}{:}~nat
        \end{\al{message}}
      \end{\al{messages}}
    \end{\al{output}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
\end{alectryon}

\sphinxstepscope


\chapter{MathJax in Sphinx}
\label{\detokenize{math:mathjax-in-sphinx}}\label{\detokenize{math::doc}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Using any math on a page causes Sphinx to automatically load MathJax: \(e^{i\pi} = -1\).

\sphinxAtStartPar
If you want to highlight pieces of code with MathJax, too, then you can either:
\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Use a custom mathjax config script (see the discussion in \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{recipes/mathjax.rst}}, the configuration in \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{conf.py}}, and the implementation in \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{recipes/sphinx/\_static/mathjax\_config.js}}).  Math in the following snippet is highlighted using this technique; look for the link to \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{mathjax\_config.js}} in the \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{<head>}} of this webpage:

\begin{alectryon}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Notation}~\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}\PYGZbs{}mathbb\PYGZob{}N\PYGZcb{}\PYGZdq{}}~\PYG{o}{:=}~nat\PYG{o}{.}\Al{nl}
    \end{\al{input}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
  \Al{sep}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Print}~nat\PYG{o}{.}
    \end{\al{input}}
    \Al{sep}
    \begin{\al{output}}
      \begin{\al{messages}}
        \begin{\al{message}}
          \PYG{k+kn}{Inductive}~\PYG{+nf}{nat}~\PYG{o}{:}~\PYG{k+kt}{Set}~\PYG{o}{:=}\Al{nl}
          ~~~~O~\PYG{o}{:}~\PYG{o}{\PYGZbs{}}mathbb\PYG{o}{\PYGZob{}}N\PYG{o}{\PYGZcb{}}~\PYG{o}{|}~S~\PYG{o}{:}~\PYG{o}{\PYGZbs{}}mathbb\PYG{o}{\PYGZob{}}N\PYG{o}{\PYGZcb{}}~\PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}}~\PYG{o}{\PYGZbs{}}mathbb\PYG{o}{\PYGZob{}}N\PYG{o}{\PYGZcb{}.}\Al{nl}
          \Al{nl}
          \PYG{k+kn}{Arguments}~S~\PYGZus{}\PYG{o}{\PYGZpc{}}\PYGZus{}nat\PYGZus{}scope
        \end{\al{message}}
      \end{\al{messages}}
    \end{\al{output}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
\end{alectryon}

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Use a custom script to add class \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{mathjax\_process}} to each \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{.alectryon\sphinxhyphen{}io}} block, on a single page.  This works best if you need MathJax on just one page and you do not need to customize MathJax further.  Math in the following Coq snippet is highlighted that way (view the source of this page to see the custom script):



\begin{alectryon}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Notation}~\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}\PYGZbs{}mathbb\PYGZob{}B\PYGZcb{}\PYGZdq{}}~\PYG{o}{:=}~bool\PYG{o}{.}\Al{nl}
    \end{\al{input}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
  \Al{sep}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Print}~bool\PYG{o}{.}
    \end{\al{input}}
    \Al{sep}
    \begin{\al{output}}
      \begin{\al{messages}}
        \begin{\al{message}}
          \PYG{k+kn}{Inductive}~\PYG{+nf}{bool}~\PYG{o}{:}~\PYG{k+kt}{Set}~\PYG{o}{:=}\Al{nl}
          ~~~~true~\PYG{o}{:}~\PYG{o}{\PYGZbs{}}mathbb\PYG{o}{\PYGZob{}}B\PYG{o}{\PYGZcb{}}~\PYG{o}{|}~false~\PYG{o}{:}~\PYG{o}{\PYGZbs{}}mathbb\PYG{o}{\PYGZob{}}B\PYG{o}{\PYGZcb{}.}
        \end{\al{message}}
      \end{\al{messages}}
    \end{\al{output}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
\end{alectryon}

\end{itemize}

\sphinxstepscope


\chapter{Integration with MyST}
\label{\detokenize{MyST:integration-with-myst}}\label{\detokenize{MyST::doc}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
To combine Alectryon and MyST (a Markdown parser with support for docutils/Sphinx directives), just load both plugins in your Sphinx configuration:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
extensions = [\PYGZdq{}alectryon.sphinx\PYGZdq{}, \PYGZdq{}myst\PYGZus{}parser\PYGZdq{}]
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
That’s enough to run Coq fragments and link to identifiers:

\begin{alectryon}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Print}~nat\PYG{o}{.}
    \end{\al{input}}
    \Al{sep}
    \begin{\al{output}}
      \begin{\al{messages}}
        \begin{\al{message}}
          \PYG{k+kn}{Inductive}~\PYG{+nf}{nat}~\PYG{o}{:}~\PYG{k+kt}{Set}~\PYG{o}{:=}~~O~\PYG{o}{:}~nat~\PYG{o}{|}~S~\PYG{o}{:}~nat~\PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}}~nat\PYG{o}{.}\Al{nl}
          \Al{nl}
          \PYG{k+kn}{Arguments}~S~\PYGZus{}\PYG{o}{\PYGZpc{}}\PYGZus{}nat\PYGZus{}scope
        \end{\al{message}}
      \end{\al{messages}}
    \end{\al{output}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
\end{alectryon}

\sphinxAtStartPar
For roles use \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{\{role\}`argument`}} syntax: \sphinxstyleemphasis{\sphinxhref{https://coq.inria.fr/library/Coq.Init.Nat.html\#even}{like this}}.  For math use either the \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{\{math\}}} role (\(e^{i\pi} = -1\)) or \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{\$}} signs (with the \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{dollarmath}} extension, see \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{conf.py}}): (\(\cos(\pi) = -1\)).

\sphinxAtStartPar
Note that MyST disables MathJax’s heuristics for finding text to process (by marking the root of the document with \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{mathjax\_ignore}}), so any math outside of \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{\{math\}}} or \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{\$}} delimiters is not processed: \textbackslash{}(this is not math\textbackslash{}); use the \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{mathjax\_process}} HTML class to revert that.


\section{Nesting}
\label{\detokenize{MyST:nesting}}\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Item

\begin{sphinxadmonition}{note}{Note:}\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Item:

\begin{alectryon}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Check}~nat\PYG{o}{.}
    \end{\al{input}}
    \Al{sep}
    \begin{\al{output}}
      \begin{\al{messages}}
        \begin{\al{message}}
          nat\Al{nl}
          ~~~~~\PYG{o}{:}~\PYG{k+kt}{Set}
        \end{\al{message}}
      \end{\al{messages}}
    \end{\al{output}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
\end{alectryon}

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Item:
\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Rocq

\begin{alectryon}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Check}~\PYG{k+kt}{Prop}\PYG{o}{.}
    \end{\al{input}}
    \Al{sep}
    \begin{\al{output}}
      \begin{\al{messages}}
        \begin{\al{message}}
          \PYG{k+kt}{Prop}\Al{nl}
          ~~~~~\PYG{o}{:}~\PYG{k+kt}{Type}
        \end{\al{message}}
      \end{\al{messages}}
    \end{\al{output}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
\end{alectryon}

\end{itemize}

\end{itemize}
\end{sphinxadmonition}

\end{itemize}

\sphinxstepscope


\chapter{Corner cases}
\label{\detokenize{corner_cases:corner-cases}}\label{\detokenize{corner_cases::doc}}\begin{quote}\begin{description}
\sphinxlineitem{date}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Test

\end{description}\end{quote}

\sphinxAtStartPar
To compile:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n}{alectryon} \PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{n}{stdin}\PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{n}{filename} \PYG{n}{corner\PYGZus{}cases}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{rst} \PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{n}{frontend} \PYG{n}{rst} \PYGZbs{}
  \PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{n}{o} \PYG{n}{corner\PYGZus{}cases}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{html} \PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}} \PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}} \PYG{n}{corner\PYGZus{}cases}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{rst}
    \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Coq → HTML; produces ‘corner\PYGZus{}cases.html’}
\PYG{n}{alectryon} \PYG{n}{corner\PYGZus{}cases}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{rst} \PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{n}{o} \PYG{n}{corner\PYGZus{}cases}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{xe}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{tex} \PYGZbs{}
  \PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{n}{latex}\PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{n}{dialect} \PYG{n}{xelatex}
    \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Coq → LaTeX; produces ‘corner\PYGZus{}cases.xe.tex’}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\section{Goal names}
\label{\detokenize{corner_cases:goal-names}}
\begin{alectryon}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Goal}~\PYG{k+kt}{True}~\PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}}~\PYG{k+kt}{True}~\PYG{o}{/\PYGZbs{}}~\PYG{k+kt}{True}\PYG{o}{.}
    \end{\al{input}}
    \Al{sep}
    \begin{\al{output}}
      \begin{\al{goals}}
        \begin{\al{goal}}
          \begin{\al{hyps}}\end{\al{hyps}}
          \Al{sep}
          \Al{infrule}{}
          \Al{sep}
          \begin{\al{conclusion}}
            \PYG{k+kt}{True}~\PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}\PYGZgt{}}~\PYG{k+kt}{True}~\PYG{o}{/\PYGZbs{}}~\PYG{k+kt}{True}
          \end{\al{conclusion}}
        \end{\al{goal}}
      \end{\al{goals}}
    \end{\al{output}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
  \Al{sep}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      ~~\PYG{+nb}{intros}\PYG{o}{;}~\PYG{+nb}{refine}~\PYG{o}{(}conj~\PYG{o}{?[}G1\PYG{o}{]}~\PYG{o}{?[}G2\PYG{o}{]).}
    \end{\al{input}}
    \Al{sep}
    \begin{\al{output}}
      \begin{\al{goals}}
        \begin{\al{goal}}
          \begin{\al{hyps}}
            \Al{hyp}{H}{\PYG{k+kt}{True}}
          \end{\al{hyps}}
          \Al{sep}
          \Al{infrule}{\Al{gid}{G1}}
          \Al{sep}
          \begin{\al{conclusion}}
            \PYG{k+kt}{True}
          \end{\al{conclusion}}
        \end{\al{goal}}
        \Al{sep}
        \begin{\al{extragoals}}
          \begin{\al{goal}}
            \begin{\al{hyps}}
              \Al{hyp}{H}{\PYG{k+kt}{True}}
            \end{\al{hyps}}
            \Al{sep}
            \Al{infrule}{\Al{gid}{G2}}
            \Al{sep}
            \begin{\al{conclusion}}
              \PYG{k+kt}{True}
            \end{\al{conclusion}}
          \end{\al{goal}}
        \end{\al{extragoals}}
      \end{\al{goals}}
    \end{\al{output}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
  \Al{sep}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      ~~\PYG{o}{[}G1\PYG{o}{]:}~\PYG{+nb+bp}{exact}~I\PYG{o}{.}
    \end{\al{input}}
    \Al{sep}
    \begin{\al{output}}
      \begin{\al{goals}}
        \begin{\al{goal}}
          \begin{\al{hyps}}
            \Al{hyp}{H}{\PYG{k+kt}{True}}
          \end{\al{hyps}}
          \Al{sep}
          \Al{infrule}{\Al{gid}{G2}}
          \Al{sep}
          \begin{\al{conclusion}}
            \PYG{k+kt}{True}
          \end{\al{conclusion}}
        \end{\al{goal}}
      \end{\al{goals}}
    \end{\al{output}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
  \Al{sep}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      ~~\PYG{o}{[}G2\PYG{o}{]:}~\PYG{+nb+bp}{exact}~I\PYG{o}{.}\Al{nl}
    \end{\al{input}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
  \Al{sep}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Qed}\PYG{o}{.}
    \end{\al{input}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
\end{alectryon}


\section{Hypothesis bodies}
\label{\detokenize{corner_cases:hypothesis-bodies}}
\begin{alectryon}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Goal}~\PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{a}~\PYG{o}{:=}~\PYG{o}{(}\PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{bb}~\PYG{o}{:=}~\PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{b}~\PYG{o}{:=}~\PYG{l+m+mi}{1}~\PYG{k}{in}~\PYG{o}{(}b~\PYG{o}{,}~b\PYG{o}{)\PYGZpc{}}nat~\PYG{k}{in}\Al{nl}
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~\PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{tt}~\PYG{o}{:=}~\PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{t}~\PYG{o}{:=}~nat~\PYG{k}{in}~\PYG{o}{(}t~\PYG{o}{*}~t\PYG{o}{)\PYGZpc{}}type~\PYG{k}{in}\Al{nl}
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~bb~\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}:}~tt\PYG{o}{)}~\PYG{k}{in}\Al{nl}
      ~~~~~fst~a~\PYG{o}{=}~snd~a\PYG{o}{.}
    \end{\al{input}}
    \Al{sep}
    \begin{\al{output}}
      \begin{\al{goals}}
        \begin{\al{goal}}
          \begin{\al{hyps}}\end{\al{hyps}}
          \Al{sep}
          \Al{infrule}{}
          \Al{sep}
          \begin{\al{conclusion}}
            \PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{a}~\PYG{o}{:=}\Al{nl}
            ~~\PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{bb}~\PYG{o}{:=}~\PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{b}~\PYG{o}{:=}~\PYG{l+m+mi}{1}~\PYG{k}{in}~\PYG{o}{(}b\PYG{o}{,}~b\PYG{o}{)}~\PYG{k}{in}\Al{nl}
            ~~\PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{tt}~\PYG{o}{:=}~\PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{t}~\PYG{o}{:=}~nat~\PYG{k}{in}~\PYG{o}{(}t~\PYG{o}{*}~t\PYG{o}{)\PYGZpc{}}type~\PYG{k}{in}~bb~\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}:}~tt\Al{nl}
            ~~\PYG{k}{in}\Al{nl}
            fst~a~\PYG{o}{=}~snd~a
          \end{\al{conclusion}}
        \end{\al{goal}}
      \end{\al{goals}}
    \end{\al{output}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
  \Al{sep}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Proof}\PYG{o}{.}
    \end{\al{input}}
    \Al{sep}
    \begin{\al{output}}
      \begin{\al{goals}}
        \begin{\al{goal}}
          \begin{\al{hyps}}\end{\al{hyps}}
          \Al{sep}
          \Al{infrule}{}
          \Al{sep}
          \begin{\al{conclusion}}
            \PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{a}~\PYG{o}{:=}\Al{nl}
            ~~\PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{bb}~\PYG{o}{:=}~\PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{b}~\PYG{o}{:=}~\PYG{l+m+mi}{1}~\PYG{k}{in}~\PYG{o}{(}b\PYG{o}{,}~b\PYG{o}{)}~\PYG{k}{in}\Al{nl}
            ~~\PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{tt}~\PYG{o}{:=}~\PYG{k}{let}~\PYG{+nv}{t}~\PYG{o}{:=}~nat~\PYG{k}{in}~\PYG{o}{(}t~\PYG{o}{*}~t\PYG{o}{)\PYGZpc{}}type~\PYG{k}{in}~bb~\PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}:}~tt\Al{nl}
            ~~\PYG{k}{in}\Al{nl}
            fst~a~\PYG{o}{=}~snd~a
          \end{\al{conclusion}}
        \end{\al{goal}}
      \end{\al{goals}}
    \end{\al{output}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}

\section{Self\sphinxhyphen{}reference}

\end{alectryon}

\section{Exercise directive}
\label{\detokenize{corner_cases:exercise-directive}}
\begin{sphinxtopic}
\sphinxstyletopictitle{Exercise: Commutativity of addition}

\begin{alectryon}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Goal}~\PYG{k}{forall}~\PYG{+nv}{x}~\PYG{+nv}{y}\PYG{o}{:}~nat\PYG{o}{,}~x~\PYG{o}{+}~y~\PYG{o}{=}~y~\PYG{o}{+}~x\PYG{o}{.}
    \end{\al{input}}
    \Al{sep}
    \begin{\al{output}}
      \begin{\al{goals}}
        \begin{\al{goal}}
          \begin{\al{hyps}}\end{\al{hyps}}
          \Al{sep}
          \Al{infrule}{}
          \Al{sep}
          \begin{\al{conclusion}}
            \PYG{k}{forall}~\PYG{+nv}{x}~\PYG{+nv}{y}~\PYG{o}{:}~nat\PYG{o}{,}~x~\PYG{o}{+}~y~\PYG{o}{=}~y~\PYG{o}{+}~x
          \end{\al{conclusion}}
        \end{\al{goal}}
      \end{\al{goals}}
    \end{\al{output}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
  \Al{sep}
  \begin{\al{sentence}}
    \begin{\al{input}}
      \PYG{k+kn}{Abort}\PYG{o}{.}
    \end{\al{input}}
  \end{\al{sentence}}
\end{alectryon}
\end{sphinxtopic}

\end{alectryon}

\label{\detokenize{corner_cases:nesting-and-indentation}}\begin{itemize}

\sphinxAtStartPar
